hypothesis:
Given that the paper demonstrates successful discovery of metal superhydrides using machine learning guided by chemical template theory, but relies on pre-identification of metal lattices with strong electron localization at interstitial sites, a novel hypothesis extending this work would be:

**Hypothesis:** Direct machine learning prediction of three-dimensional electron localization function (ELF) distributions from atomic composition and symmetry constraints alone will enable the discovery of stable superhydrides with non-traditional metal sublattice geometries that exhibit superconducting transition temperatures exceeding 200 K at pressures below 150 GPa.
